pokemon:arctozolt.name: Arctozolt
pokemon:arctozolt.summary: This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly.
The shaking of its freezing upper half is what generates its electricity. It has a hard time walking around.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This Pokémon lived on prehistoric seashores and was able to preserve food with the ice on its body. It went extinct because it moved so slowly.

form:arctozolt.name: Arctozolt
form:arctozolt.summary: Arctozolt form with Electric / Ice typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
breedingNotes: Breeding notes are pending a richer source import.
